reason: Enabling Certmap in SSSD requires specific, domain-dependent configuration entries in sssd.conf. Applying a generic or incorrect certmap rule can break authentication for users or groups relying on SSSD, potentially leading to a lockout from the system.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Incorrect configuration in sssd.conf can break identity/authentication services; Requires knowledge of specific domain/certificate mapping requirements; Potential for user lockout if the matchrule or maprule is misconfigured
